author: lOrm
content: Fixed: src/tools/task.rs::execute_task_get now returns (Value::Null.to_string(), false) for missing task_id instead of ("not found", true), matching CC TaskGetTool's null-on-miss contract. The implementation lives in src/tools/task.rs, not src/subagent.rs (subagent.rs only references the tool name in its allow-list, untouched). Updated stale test_task_get_not_found (which asserted the old is_error=true behaviour) to two #588-banner tests: fix588_task_get_not_found_returns_success_with_null (asserts is_error=false, payload parses as JSON null) and fix588_task_get_found_still_returns_full_detail (regression guard for the happy path). Verified: cargo test --lib fix588 → 2/2 pass.
